context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 143 verifies PDF CONTENT IMPROVEMENTS: (1) AI prompt has strong anti-cross-reference instructions requiring each variant to be AUTONOMA with ALL interventions listed explicitly, (2) AI prompt JSON schema includes rischi_residui array and stima_manodopera field in all variants, (3) PDF has new 'Registro di Manutenzione' section with semi-annual obligation text, (4) PDF has 8-item 'Check-list Verifiche Post-Intervento', (5) PDF Rischi Residui section renders conditionally with warning styling, (6) PDF variant footer shows 'Manodopera Stimata' label, (7) PDF solution image label updated to 'Soluzione tipo (sostituibile con foto proprie installazioni)', (8) Frontend has data-testid='rischi-residui-section' and displays stima_manodopera in variant cards. Test PDF generated at /tmp/test_iteration143_full.pdf (197KB).
